features: With a 50 percent improvement in drilling speed
Circular holes with clean, virtually burr-free hole edges
Suitable for portable or stationary drilling of high alloy content steels and metals with a tensile strength up to 1100 N/mm2
Non-slip shaft: 3 milled clamping surfaces prevent the drill from spinning in the chuck and ensure optimal power transmission
Spin proof 3 sided shaft for optimal grip in drill chuck
description: From the manufacturer The Dewalt accessory program Screws One of the most common connection types for wood or metal is screwing. For the different types of screws such as Phillips, Pozidriv or Torx, DeWalt offers an extensive range of screwdriver bits and bit sets. The right bit from DeWalt for each screw. Drilling Every day clean, accurate drilling in stone, wood or metal are required on a construction site. For drilling in these different materials, DeWalt offers a wide range of drilling. Various drill lengths, quality classes and recording systems such as SDS-plus or SDS-Max are available. The right drill bit from DeWalt for every material. Separate By sawing or grinding, workpieces are adjusted. This work is done with various tools such as circular saws, jigsaws, reciprocating saws or angle grinders. In the extensive DeWalt range, the matching saw blades and cutting discs in different diameters or lengths can be found for all these tools. Whether wood, metal or stone is to be separated, DeWalt has the right accessories. bows The grinding of a workpiece is the final end or fine processing. Whether by hand, with a belt, triangle, eccentric or vibration sander, DeWalt has a wide selection of matching sanding grids, sanding belts, sanding papers or sanding discs in the appropriate size or grit. DeWalt abrasive for a perfect finish.
